zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Gatesden於1268年12月20日出生在英國米德萊可素塔爾時，她的父親John de Gatesden II39歲，母親Margaret de Gatesden22歲。她於1285年與Richard I Chamberlain在英國哈普爾威克姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1310年在英國哈普爾威克姆享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Gatesden was born on 20 December 1268, in Southall, Middlesex, England, her father, John de Gatesden II, was 39 and her mother, Margaret de Gatesden, was 22. She married Richard I Chamberlain in 1285, in Wickham, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1310, in Wickham, Hampshire, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Gatesden est née le 20 décembre 1268, à Southall, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John de Gatesden II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Gatesden, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard I Chamberlain en 1285, à Wickham, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1310, à Wickham, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Gatesden am 20. Dezember 1268 in Southall, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Gatesden II 39 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Gatesden 22. Sie hat 1285 in Wickham, Hampshire, England Richard I Chamberlain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1310 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Wickham, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Gatesdenが1268年12月20日にイギリスミッドレセックスソウサルで生まれた時，父John de Gatesden IIは39歳，母Margaret de Gatesdenは22歳であった。1285年にイギリスハンプシュアイアウィックハムでRichard I Chamberlainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1310年にイギリスハンプシュアイアウィックハムで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Gatesden(이)가 1268년 12월 20일 영국 미들레세스 소우솔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Gatesden II(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Gatesden(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1285년 영국 함프실르 윅함에서 Richard I Chamberlain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 영국 함프실르 윅함에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Gatesden родилась 20 декабря 1268 г. в местности соутолл, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Gatesden II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Gatesden, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard I Chamberlain в 1285 г. в местности виккхам, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1310 г. в местности виккхам, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.
